entry.title: What is app code for IQ01 in S/4 HANA public cloud
entry.content: IN SAP Private cloud i can create serilizes equipment using IQ01 transaction. what is fiori app code for IQ01 in SAP Public cloud

entry.title: Re: how to solve SAP error - Vendor xxxxx not found in PL...
entry.content:
Hi,

This error looks like a customized error, consult with your ABAP team.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Mass filtering in SAP Signavio?
entry.content: Hi Daniel, sounds great :), this function is only accessable in the Dashboard and not in the Investigation? Regards Niels

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Tresholds with filter in numeric point
entry.content:
We are showing a specific key figure in a numeric point chart.

The threshold for this KPI depends on the category (1,2,3,4) of the plant. That’s why I created 4 tresholds, one for each category.

Example:

I can only display the threshold in the numeric point chart, when I use the dimension “Kategorie” in the chart. Because I cannot display a dimension in a numeric point chart, I added it as a filter (Kategorie 1,2,3,4). I can then have the threshold values displayed.

After inserting it works, but when I change the plant in the story filter and thus also the category, the shown tresholds do not fit the category.

I already tried a restricted key figure on the category without adding the category to the numeric point filter, with the same result.

In a line diagram it works when I add the category as dimension to the colour.

Any ideas how to solve it? Is it possible in numeric point charts?

entry.title: SAP SD Voucher request to digital skills for Certification
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm an SAP SD Functional Consultant (ECC and S4 HANA) from India. I've been working in SAP fields for 8.6 Years Now. I have Knowledge on SAP S4 HANA Sales & Distribution but not certified.

People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts, Parent.

I really love working with SAP. I want to keep learning and growing in this field for lifetime to have a great career opportunity.

I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because I believe it would help me to learn more knowledge in SAP and Career Opportunities.

I hope you will consider my application for the free certification in SAP S4 HANA-Sales & Distribution.

Thanks a Lot for this grateful Opportunity!


Thanks and Regards.
Prasad

entry.title: hide a specific view for a specific role
entry.content:
Hi guys,

We need to hide specific views for specific roles. We have tried using codelist restriction and layout, but we still can't achieve this.

Could you help with this.Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Mass filtering in SAP Signavio?
entry.content:
Yes this is only available for dashboards:

https://help.sap.com/docs/signavio-process-intelligence/user-guide/filter-types?locale=en-US#advanced-filter

entry.title: Re: HANA Design-Time HDI composite role
entry.content:
They are grantable to others in #OO of A and B but they are not grantable to others anymore when assigned to #OO of C via the service. #OO of C creates a composite roles which includes roles from A and B and it will have to assign this composite role to itself, this is where I think it doesn't work.

hdbrole in A and B

{
  "role": {
    "name": "access",
    "schema_privileges": [
      {
        "privileges": [
          "SELECT",
          "SELECT CDS METADATA",          
	      "SELECT METADATA"
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}
{
  "role": {
    "name": "access_g#",
    "schema_privileges": [
      {
        "privileges_with_grant_option": [
          "SELECT",
          "SELECT CDS METADATA",          
	      "SELECT METADATA"
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

hdbgrants in C

{

  "SN_ZECC_STG_FIN_01": {
  
    "object_owner" : {
        "schema_roles":[
            "access_g#"
          ]
    },
    
    "application_user" : {
        "schema_roles":[
            "access"
          ]
    }  
  
  }   
  
}

 hdbroleconfig in C

{
  "access_comp": {
    "ZECC_STG_FIN_01": {
      "schema": "ZECC_STG_FIN_01_HDI_DB_1"
    },
    "ZECC_STG_FIN_MD_01": {
      "schema": "ZECC_STG_FIN_MD_01_HDI_DB_1"
    }
  }
}

hdbrole in C

{
  "role": {
    "name": "access_comp",
    "schema_roles": [
      {
        "schema_reference": "ZECC_STG_FIN_01",
        "names": [
          "access"
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

entry.title: Re: SAP SD Voucher request to digital skills for Certification
entry.content:
Hi @PrasadGoud ,

Thanks for writing!

Out of curiosity - where would you say the majority of your SD projects are located geographically? 

Invite sent.

entry.title: Re: Assign IM mouvement to WM - Check table T156SY: entry...
entry.content:
• The first message corresponds the delivery class of the table, it is 'S' so only SAP is allowed to maintain
  • The second messages caused by the fact that the table doesn't handle client MANDT as a key (so not allowed by default)

You could change the table delivery class with SE11 from S to G and open change with SCC4 to remove second message (good luck at next upgrade and side effects)

But you shouldn't, better try to raise an incident/case to OSS or change your solution.

entry.title: Request for digital skills initiative by SAP Learning
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano ,
First of all thanks for this digital skills initiative by SAP Learning.
I am interested in taking this learning opportunity.

Name : Ashwani Kumar Tiwari
Location : India
Experience : Have prior SAP experience -06 Months
Modules :PP, MM, SD, CRM
Currently : Looking forward to learn SAP as per my Job role requirement in SCM for career growth

Interested in learning - SD, MM, PP, EWM and HANA basics to Advance

I fall under category (First Generation College Graduate in my Family who belongs to a below poverty line farmer family in the remote India, struggled too much to get a college degree and deprived from eduacation compared to the urban privileged urban graduate and wants to start my career in SAP)

Requesting you to consider this and so the needful , thanks in advance .

Thanks & Regards
Ashwani Kumar Tiwari

entry.title: Re: What is app code for IQ01 in S/4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Here is IQ01 fiori app

App ID F6879 : Manage Material Serial Numbers

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F6879')/S32 

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('IQ01')/S32 

Regards

entry.title: Landed cost list not showing while copying from Landed cost
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
We have created a GRPO. Based on Multiple Landed costs are created. Now we need to reverse one of the landed costs. We need to create a landed cost based on the original landed cost. But in the list landed costs are not showing.
 
We have checked the same in the latest version it is showing.
 
Current SAP Version: 9.3  PL: 14 
 
Please share your observation.
 
Regards,
Shubham Bulley

entry.title: SAP Sales Service Cloud Version 2 API - Why no OData support?
entry.content:
Hello together,

someone knows the reason why v2 support only REST and not OData? SAP Cloud for customer (v1) uses OData Services. CAP is using OData and other SAP backend APIs are also OData Services. So I am just curious why REST was chosen or if OData will be supported later.

E.g.

v2 https://api.sap.com/api/SalesSvcCloudV2_taskService/overview 

v1 https://api.sap.com/api/activity/overview 

Thanks and best regards,

Julian

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello!

I come from Trier, Germany. This is the oldest city in Germany and it is close to Luxembourg.

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion Integration
entry.content: Hi Shane, thanks for your reply. Yes, currently I can access SAP Companion within the SAP UI5 site. However, the user requirement is to combine the blue sidebar and the enable now grey sidebar. They do not want the grey bar to show at all. So, the only possible way I can think off, is to integrate the guided tour/help topic icons onto the blue sidebar, but not sure if this is possible. I've also added an image so you could have a clearer picture on this. Thanks

entry.title: Re: 1H 2024 - Release highlights of SuccessFactors Performance and Goals
entry.content:
Hi @SachinPachauri,

Is it possible to see the all the cascate goals or only per goal?

Thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG: HANA Search making default for both Customer & Supplier
entry.content: It should really depend on the OVP you are using. The Customer OVP and Supplier OVP should be separate as they are different pages.

entry.title: Re: How To Upload Data to a Public or Private Planning Version Using a File Upload Custom Widget Wi
entry.content:
When Enable Pivot Settings, I have Date field from column 11 in my source file. I have provided Pivot Column Start 11 Pivot Key Date Pivot Value LOC_AMT Enable Date Format Settings YYYYMM Select Date Dimension to Add Format Date is selected.

In source file I have 202407, 202408 till 202412 as Date.

All other fields are mapped under Upload File Mappings.

But I get The key dimension Date has no value.

Data contains unknown column 202407.

Can you please highlight if any change required or anything missing?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Supply Chain - The Link Collection
entry.content:
Explore this blog with up-to-date resources on Supply Chain in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Here you can find useful links related to your enablement, as demos, expert blogs, trainings, videos and more.

 

Get Started on Supply Chain 

Product Assistance: Find out which capabilities are available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Best Practices: Access the best practices choosing the version, lines of business, Supply Chain

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: Check the business scope overview 2402

 

Delivered Key Innovations by Release

Check relevant blogs, videos and trainings divided by release.

Search for features and demo videos

You are searching for a feature in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for Supply Chain and a demo video that shows the feature in the system? Here you are right!

Download the List of Innovations - Excel spreadsheet that lists all Supply Chain Management innovations covered in the release highlights YouTube videos and/or described in the release update blog posts.

Release Highlights - YouTube Videos

2402 | 2308 | 2302 | 2208 | 2202 | 2111 | 2108 | 2105 | 2102 | 2011 | 2008 | 2005 | 2002 | 1911 | 1908 | 1905 | 1902 | 1811 | 1808 | 1805 

Release Blogs - Supply Chain

2402 | 2308 | 2302 EN DE | 2208 | 2202.3 (Advanced InterCompany) | 2202 | 2111 | 2108 | 2105 | 2102 | 2011 | 2008 | 2005 | 2002 | 1911 | 1908 | 1905 | 1902 | 1811 | 1808 | 1805 | 1802

Release Blogs - Discrete Industries

2402 | 2308 | 2302 | 2208 | 2202 | 2111 | 2108 | 2105 | 2102 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Early Release Series

2402 | 2308 | 2302 | 2208 | 2202 | 2111 | 2108 | 2105 | 2102 | 2011 | 2008 | 2005

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product Expert Training

2308 | 2302 | 2208 | 2202 | 2102 | 2008 | 2002

Release Blogs - Supply Chain Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

2023 | 2022 | 2021 | 2020 

 

Get Insights from SAP Experts

Expert Talk: Transportation Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition

Expert Talk: Run Your Warehouse Processes with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Podcast episodes: Inside SAP S/4HANA Cloud

 

What's New and Coming Soon

What’s New Viewer - Supply Chain

Roadmap Explorer Supply Chain

 

Start Learning

Build the skills you need at your own pace starting here.

Learn SAP skills | SAP Learning: check free learning options and get certified

Exploring Business Scenarios in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Supply Chain

Configuring Supply Chain Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Warehouse Management

Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Transportation Management

Microlearnings on openSAP: watch short videos with system demos

In-Depth With SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: join deep-dive sessions to learn from product experts

End-user Tutorials for SAP S/4HANA Cloud: learn with hands-on experience

 

Demos

(Partner Access): S/4HANA Public Cloud - Transportation and Warehousing

(Partner Access): S/4HANA Cloud – Unlocking Efficiency - Exploring S4HANA's Inventory Management Capabilities

(Partner Access): SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management

(Partner Access): SAP S/4HANA: Order Fulfillment with Subcontracting

(Partner Access): S/4HANA Cloud: Make to Stock – Discrete Industries

(Partner Access): S/4HANA Cloud: Make to Order

 

SAP Community - Your Voice Matters

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - SAP Community

Access SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Line of Business

  • Finance
  • Supply Chain
  • Manufacturing
  • Sourcing and Procurement
  • Sales
  • Solution Business
  • R&D / Engineering
  • Asset Management
  • Service Management
  • Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management
  • Professional Services

 

Resource Navigator

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - SAP Community

Recruit to Retire Human Resources

Idea to Market R&D and Engineering | Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management | Product Compliance

Acquire to Decommission Asset Management

Source to Pay Sourcing and Procurement

Lead to Cash Sales | Solution Order Management  | Service | Professional Services

Finance Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC)

Discrete Industries | Retail | Sustainability | User Experience | Localization | Identity and Access Management

entry.title: Re: Help Needed: Error with Call Transaction in BDC (ABAP Program CL_BUPA_RESULT_SUB_SCREEN_ALV=CP)
entry.content: For most Enjoy transactions, BDC / Batch Input are no longer supported, better look for 2484299 - BAPI list for BP , IDOCs or Classes (use any search tool)

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia
entry.content:
Hi @Mervyn 
We have some points need clarification from SAP regarding DRC solution for Malaysia e-invoice.

  1. It was planned to deliver buyer rejection on 30th of June in the previous roadmap in the regulatory change manager. There is no documentation about supplier e-invoice for inbound flow in the SAP help portal: Document and Reporting Compliance | SAP Help Portal. How can customer retrieve e-invoices from IRBM to integrate with incoming automation solution? Does SAP have any plan to provide the integration with IRBM to retrieve supplier e-invoices? and when is the plan for delivery date?

  2. How to map the surcharge condition type at header level? According to SAP Help portal: Configuring Header Allowance Active (HEADER_ALLOWANCE_ACT) | SAP Help Portal only the mapping of discount header condition types.

  3. Does SAP support prepayment information that must be included in the e-invoice for both customer invoices and self-billed e-invoice? I found nothing in the method FILL_PREPAID_PAYMENT.

  4. Tax Exemption reason is applicable for both import and export transactions, but the mapping is available only for export with the mapping of Text Type for Tax Exemption Reasons (EXEMPT_TEXT_TYPE). Specifying the Text Type for Tax Exemption Reasons (EXEMPT_TEXT_TYPE) | SAP Help Portal
    What about import?
  5. Assigning eDocument Type to Billing type documentation is missing in SAP Help portal.
    We expect to maintain this customizing activity in the TVFKEDOCV view via the SM30 transaction.

Only accounting document type is available for both S/4HANA and ECC.
S/4HANA: Assigning eDocument Type to Accounting Document Type | SAP Help Portal
ECC: Assigning eDocument Type to Accounting Document Type | SAP Help Portal

But accounting document type itself cannot segregate invoice or credit note e-invoice type. For instance, document type RV could be invoice or credit note or debit note.  

6. How to maintain required information for export sales?

  • Free Trade Agreement (FTA) Information
  • Authorisation Number for Certified Exporter (e.g., ATIGA number)
  • Reference Number of Customs Form No.2

Only reference numbers of customs forms for importation of goods is mentioned in the SAP Help portal: Specifying the Text Type for Reference Numbers of Customs Forms (IMPORT_TEXT_TYPE) | SAP Help Portal

7. If the foreign vendor supplies both goods and service, how to maintain classification in the vendor master? I couldn’t find a field at the line item of the transaction to change the classification code.

8. If we send an e-invoice to IRBM and then distribute it to the customer through the Peppol Network, how does SAP count the number of transactions for DRC licensing? Is it considered 1 or 2 transactions?

Thank you in advance for your clarification. Your input will help us to move forward with a smooth implementation within our challenging timeline.

Kind regards,
Patchanok

entry.title: Re: Hello World
entry.content:
Hi @Ashwani_MBA ,

Welcome aboard!

If you want a general idea of what SAP is about, I can recommend Discovering End-to-End Business Processes for the Intelligent Enterprise

For an understanding of the supply chain module in our flagship product (SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud), try this:
Step 1: Exploring SAP Cloud ERP

Step 2: Exploring Business Scenarios in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Supply Chain

Step 3: Configuring Supply Chain Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

If you are looking to achieve a SAP certification, here is one track that is available:

Step 1: Discovering SAP Business Network Supply Chain Collaboration Features and Functions

Step 2: Configuring SAP Business Network Supply Chain Collaboration

The certification looks quite advanced - I would not try it without at least cursory look at the other content.

entry.title: Re: Loading data to Planning enabled Model through Analyt...
entry.content:
Please look at detailed documentation of the setUserInput() method, especially "The selection references a visible data cell in the rows or columns of the table. "
So, your Table should show the exact input-ready cells in 'unbooked' mode, as if you are able to do data-entry manually. Is that the case for you?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

My name is Son, and I am writing this letter with a simple purpose: I would like to participate in the SAP course organized by your esteemed company.

My family comes from an Asian country, and while there are no restrictions on accessing technology, there are still economic challenges. Both of my parents work in low-income jobs, and to support myself through education and living expenses, I have had to study and work simultaneously.

SAP is a new field to me, but I have recognized its importance in the modern economy. I believe that participating in this course will open up new opportunities and help me develop my career in the future.

I hope that your company can consider and support my participation in this SAP course. I am committed to studying and working diligently to apply the knowledge effectively in practical work.

Thank you very much for your consideration and support.

Sincerely,

Son

entry.title: Re: Request for digital skills initiative by SAP Learning
entry.content:
Hi @Ashwani_MBA , It seems I cannot send you private messages for some reason - can you check your settings or send me one first so I can invite you?

Thanks for the intro! Can you share any insight as to where most of your projects will be run?

entry.title: Re: Analysis for Office Connections to BW system without installing SAP Logon / SAP GUI
entry.content:
@former_member92735 ,  Nice post.

It relates to my case. We are working through Citrix workspace and facing issue while connecting to BW.

Can you please suggest on which server these changes are suppose to be done.

 

 

Thanks

entry.title: SAP FOUNDATION
entry.content:
Recently I learned about new concepts of SAP like S/4 HANA, SAP’s Activate Methodology, SAP Integrated Business Processes and how it is used in day-to-day business.

SAP S/4 HANA is the 4th generation of SAP Business Suite primarily build in three layers i.e., database, application, and presentation layers. I also learned that S/4 HANA provides two basic options for implementation: Brownfield (More like an upgrade of an existing version) and Greenfield (New development or installation from scratch).

·Some common applications of SAP include SAP solutions, SAP BTP ABAP Environment, SAP ERP, SAP Analytics Cloud. SAP facilitates information flow and data processing across all parts of your business.

 This module also teaches about basics of SAP implementation which can be divided in the following basic steps which includes Project Preparation, Business Blueprint, Realization, Final Preparation, Go-Live and Support. Out of this, Go-Live and support is considered as one of the most important steps. Based on the above steps it becomes much clear on how to proceed before starting a development or installation.  

I also learned about SAP activate methodology which includes Discover, Prepare, Explore, Realize, Deploy and Run. It provides a clear step between customer and consultant to accomplish complex solutions in an easier way.In the Discover phase customer look for SAP landscape based on their requirement. In the prepare phase SAP activate methodology will provide timeline, preparations, and project planning. Going ahead in the Explore phase customer will finalize which business process is to be followed to start with the development.  In the Realize phase SAP will breakdown the documents into small deliverables. Then we have the deploy phase where the code is deployed and checked as per requirement and then finally, we have the Run phase which marks the end of the development phase. Once this is done, the project moves on to the next phases.

Following this methodology, I can speed up and improve complex solution implementation projects by providing clits. But three main benefits as per my understanding that is We have less risk, receiver higher quality and we can implement our project faster. 

I learned about a new technique known as SAP Integrated Business Process which is a cloud-based solution. It helps companies forecast their sales and revenue to increase or maximize their profit with the use of simple and profitable manner. It provides different types of modules. One such example is Supply Chain Control Tower. With this, businesses can achieve end-to-end visibility on all levels which includes strategic, tactical, and operational, all in real-time.

 With the clarity of all these steps, it has become easier for me to understand the process and the timeline generally followed by SAP to complete a development. A much better understanding how a customer connects with a SAP consultant and goes ahead with it.

entry.title: Focus for search field in custom card
entry.content:
Hey Folks,

I have a small problem with the custom card. I developed a Fiori elements app and added a custom card to the analytical list page.

This custom card includes sap.m.table and two SearchFields. The problem is that the focus will not set to the search field when I click. The fields can only be activated by clicking on the magnifier glas or right click.

I also tried normal input field ... removed everything from the card except the search field. Always the same behavior. 

Hover over the searchButtons will work as expected! It seems to be a bug in the custom card.

Do you have an idea?

entry.title: Skip assembly scrap calculation in production order
entry.content:
Hi all

In our company, we have products (rolls) that can be produced in 2 different ways:

  • The first way is via a new production run. In that case, assembly scrap needs to be applied.
  • Alternatively, the roll is produced by cutting a part of an existing roll. A separate production version exists for this. However, in that case, no assembly scrap needs to be taken into account.

As the first way of production is the default one, we entered assembly scrap in the material master. Now, we are looking for a solution to skip the assembly scrap for the 2nd way of production. Any idea how we can achieve this?

Regards

Joren

entry.title: Re: Change of email address or phoneNumber is triggering...
entry.content: Thanks Samuel, I have already added the profile update screen after the mobile code verification. PhoneNumber field is received under profile.phones.number, will it not send only phoneNumber?

entry.title: SAP MDO Business Object Type Workforce Person: populate extension fields from PerPerson
entry.content:
Hey guys,
new day with MDI - new issues with MDI!

We have a working sandbox environment with SAP MDI receiving employee master data from SuccessFactors Employee Central. We're using SAP MDO Business Object Type "Workforce Person 3.5.0", which has a handful of custom fields customized under "Extension Fields". It is all working fine and the employee master data incl. the extension fields is successfully and correctly imported into the Workforce Person object until a field from SuccessFactors Employee Central personInfo (PerPerson) entity is mapped.

PROBLEM: how can fields from EC personInfo (e.g. Date of Birth/Place of Birth) be mapped to Workforce Person 3.5.0 ProfileDetails?
Example: I have added "Place of Birth" (personInfo-->placeOfBirth) as an extension field under ProfileDetails (sap.odm.workforce.ProfileDetails) {image001.png}.

Once the field was activated, I added the required picklist item with external Code "ProfileDetails_ext__personInfo_pob" to picklist BCUI_MAPPED_DOMAIN_ATTRIBUTE_NAME, to make the target field available for selection under "Manage Business Configuration" --> "personInfo" {image002.png}.

Then I went to "Manage Business Configuration" --> "personInfo" --> Details for "Place of Birth", and selected the previously created target field name "ProfileDetails_ext__personInfo_pob" under "Mapped Domain Attribute Name" {image003.png}.

My expectation is, that the extraction Job then derives the target field in ODM based on the picklist item selected under "Mapped Domain Attribute Name". So the field value for Place of Birth should be mapped to "ProfileDetails" --> "ext__personInfo_pob".

What happens is, the extraction report is failing with message: "ProfileDetails_ext__personInfo_pob in the path is invalid" {image004.png}.

Checking the payload of the failed job execution, it indeed looks a bit weird {image005.png}, because the extension field for Place of Birth is not listed under the ProfileDetails section like the other extension fields (e.g. gender, nationality) but creates an own section.

Questions:

  • Does anyone have an explanation for this behavior?
  • Does anyone ever successfully map a personInfo field to an extension field under ProfileDetails?
  • Any known workarounds for this?

Thanks for any kind of advice, pointing me into the right direction!
Cheers!

entry.title: Re: Using BAPIs in RAP
entry.content:
Hello Maciej,

I would recommend you to lock and call the BAPI in adjust_numbers( ). Or you try to lock in an determination before save method.

best regards

Jürgen

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud - European Accessibility Act Support
entry.content: Hi Sarbajeet! Indeed we are planning to publish an update Q1 2025 to Composable Storefront related to providing better support for WCAG 2.2 requirements. The goal for the first update is 90+% of the requirements fulfilled, with updates thereafter to fill any gaps discovered during customer use and internal evaluations. Note that this update will apply to ootb components only; any custom UI components will require adding accessibility features by customer. We'll be providing guidelines and a list of requirements we fulfill. Current document is https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_COMPOSABLE_STOREFRONT/eaef8c61b6d9477daf75bff9ac1b7eb4/cca046c389704e0ea1457640b25716b9.html.

entry.title: Cash discount clearing acct 403 must have Ol Tr management - change acct
Re: Scripting Tracker - SAP Window not found
entry.content:
What Do you mean by "working on"? As far as I can remember it is not possible to track a busy window. But the API lets you know if a window is busy. In my own C++ GUI tracker I  therefore exclude busy windows from tracking.

Regards, Thomas

entry.title: Re: How to capture response for submitBatch for Odata V4 in SAPUI5
entry.content: hello need to know how to use the curd operation using v4 odata

entry.title: Re: Duplicate rows appear in the story report.
entry.content: Hi Gloria , i have a question what is different type of Table Cross-Tab and Non Aggregated list in table structure ? just let me know for this

entry.title: How to process an array of a complex type in an ODATAV4 API
entry.content:
Hello,
I have the following challenge which i have to solve in my ODATAV4 API.

I want to POST data to create a contract.
My request body looks like this

{ "contractname" : "test",

    "Price": {
      "totalamount" : "10",
      "discounts": [
        {
          "Type": {
            "maintype": "justAmaintype",
            "subtype": "justAsubtype"
          }

As you can see the discounts is an array of a complex type

How can i define this in my MPC class.
I do not see an possibility to create a complex type as an array.
I can solve it somehow with entity, entityset and navigation, but i do not this this should be the correct way. as i see entities as resources in the API.

Thanks in advance for the help!

Kind regards,
Peter van Alphen

entry.title: Re: How to deploy multiple intents of same Fiori app to W...
entry.content: I was told that this isn't supported. The only thing to do is to create local copies of your app in Work Zone (if you're using Work Zone). Hopefully this has been added to the backlog of the relevant team

entry.title: Re: Optional Surveys will come with H12024 also?
entry.content: We have also been looking fo these. Seems they were removed from the home page for some reason. Here is the KB article that was sent to me. https://me.sap.com/notes/3389475

entry.title: Re: How do I generate a dynamic QR code?
entry.content: There are a lot of platforms that you can use to create QR codes. You can look into the top 15 best QR code generators to find what would work for your particular use case. I would add that the QR codes you get from any of these online tools are safe to use.

entry.title: ABAP_trial 2022 HDB start problems: log full still active in log partition
entry.content:
Hi all,

HDB of my #abap_trial 2022 hangs on startup, in /hana/shared/HDB/HDB02/vhcala4hci/trace/daemon__0000783__children.trc I found these messages

[935]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-06-12 09:57:58.194184 i EventHandler EventManagerImpl.cpp(00962) : Could not set event 'LogFullEvent[volumeid=1,eventid=1,part=/hana/log/HDB/mnt00001/hdb00001/]' to state 'handled'
[962]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-06-12 09:57:58.194220 i Logger LogSegment.cpp(03175) : log partition disk usage 100% >= log_disk_usage_limit 95%, do not create new log segment
[962]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-06-12 09:57:58.194229 i Logger LogSegment.cpp(03294) : Retry of log segment creation failed, log full still active in log partition /hana/log/HDB/mnt00001/hdb00001/, awaiting free segment or additional disk space

df says

Filesystem 1K-blocks Used Available Use% Mounted on
overlay 263112772 261397492 0 100% /
tmpfs 65536 0 65536 0% /dev
tmpfs 10240832 0 10240832 0% /sys/fs/cgroup
shm 65536 0 65536 0% /dev/shm
/dev/sdd 263112772 261397492 0 100% /etc/hosts
tmpfs 10240832 0 10240832 0% /proc/acpi
tmpfs 10240832 0 10240832 0% /sys/firmware

Some ideas on how to oversome this? @julieplummer20 any hint?

Thanks,

  Wolfgang

entry.title: Excel download in SAP Fiori Elements app gets stuck in a loop when $top and $skip not implemented...
entry.content:
$top and $skip is not implemented in custom READ event handler in CAP application.  Build a Fiori Elements List Report application based on this CAP application.  Excel download will get stuck in a loop if number of rows returned is greater than 200 (default for V2). 

GitHub repo:  https://github.com/miltonchandradas/EXT00852.git 

Branches:

  • 1_issue (Issue reproduced with OData V2 - run cds watch)
  • 2_resolution (workaround)
  • 3_issue_v4 (Issue reproduced with OData V4 - run cds watch)
  • 4_resolution_v4 (workaround)

This issue was found in SAPUI5 version 1.124.1 - Works fine in SAPUI5 version 1.120.1

entry.title: How to hide table columns dynamically in Fiori Elements Analytical List Page based on Filter values?
entry.content:
Dear all,
We have one requirement in CAP application. We are using ALP Floor plan to build Fiori app.
We need to change the visibility of Table columns dynamically based on filter value from Filter bar either it is Visual filter or compact filter bar.
We have checked dynamic expressions in annotations but it is hiding only table cell value not column. 

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/advanced/odata#dynamic-expressions .
Any help will be appreciated.


Regards,
Venkatesh.

entry.title: Message getting stuck for AS2 receiver channel via Cert Auth from PI to CPI connection.
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are checking the PI to CPI connection via Cert Auth with AS2 adapter and sending from and receiving in CPI system.

PI flow:

CPI flow:

We are using private key of PI system in the PI As2 channel and the certificate using in CPI system for authentication but still the message getting stuck in delivering state in PI only they are not reaching in CPI.

we have uploaded CPI certificates in PI system and PI key in CPI system. 

Can anyone suggest if any more details need to be maintained for successful connection.

When I tried to do via main setup run i found no databases to connect

Please help

Manoel

entry.title: Re: Issue with Prod Order Yield Confirmation - Missing se...
entry.content:
Hi,
This seems to be working as designed at the moment. Once you explicitly (Re-)Serialize a SFC, DM is no longer referencing the original ERP Serial Number in the yield confirmation. If you have different requirements, please put an influence request.
Br,
Manoel

entry.title: Store data about approver and approved object after flexible workflow approval
entry.content:
I have a requirement from our compliance people to log (store) data after approval of purchase requisitions and purchase orders. This will be used to check among other things which documents a person approved if it turns out that person was incorrectly assigned as approver.

Well, that should be easy I said, we just hook on to the change document when the document status changes to approved (define event for change document - transaction SWEC). Famous last words....
That is not quite how it works with flexible workflow where the change of the document being approved (whether it is a purchase requisition or a purchase order) is done by the workflow runtime user SAP_WFRT.

There is in fact no information in the purchase requisition's change documents about who approved the requisition. Creating an event based on the change document is not a solution (or rather, not a very useful solution) and we may as well hang on to the standard event such as CL_MM_PUR_WF_OBJECT_PO event PurchaseOrderApproved.

It looks like I will have to identify the relevant workflow log and read data from the container(s) there. Not exactly what I had hoped for, but I will just have to give it a go .... UNLESS someone here wants to share their idea about an alternative solution approach. SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: Unable to consume RAP web api in SAP Build App and Ac...

How is the Destination configured? The URL for the Destination must include the path up to just before /$metadata.

Manoel

entry.title: Re: Issue with sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataListBinding#create
entry.content:
Got the Solution.

  1. Issue: Not able to get create in sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataListBinding in SApUI5.
  2. Solution: create() in sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataListBinding is available from UI version 1.98.0, as i was using the old version, method was not available.

entry.title: Re: Issue with sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataListBinding#create

Got the Solution

create() in sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataListBinding is available since 1.98.0 version, i was using older UI version.

entry.title: Re: HOW TO GENERATE AN CUSTOMIZED REPORT FOR P2P (PROCURE...
entry.content:
Hello,

I've been same requirement for this report. what I can say in standard way you can't have standard report. Mainly I use PO as central pov to get all the details. Here some example table:

 

Details PO detail GR and Invoice:

You can use table EKPO and EKBE for this

Details PR:

You can use table EBAN for this.

Details Payment:

You can use table BSAK, linking with accounting number for AP.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic parallel processing in SAP S/4HANA flexible w...
entry.content:
My conclusion is that flexible workflow doesn't support the kind of dynamic parallell processing that you have in classic workflows, but you can have parallell processing for multiple approvers of a step in flexible workflow.

I see that you try to set a table of amount values, but that shoudn't work, you have to set a single amount in each task.
One of my conclusions is that the context is missing in parallel processing in flexible workflow - all the work items are "identical" except for the agent. So let's assume you have cost centers CC1 and CC2 in your case, when you get to your custom code there is no way to figure out whether the work item is for the owner of CC1 or the owner of CC2. The best you can hope for, if the agent is available (I didn't go this far) is to work your way back from the agent to the cost center and then determine the correct amount based on cost center(s) that person is responsible for.

This is very different from the classic workflow dynamic parallel processing where you would set a "driver element" and that element would be available in the container of your parallel work items (or workflows) to identify the context.

entry.title: Re: Provisioning System Access by Customer
entry.content:
Hi Aman,

In the screenshot its clearly mentioned as a Customer you are not allowed to access Provisioning.

Provisioning system access is given by SAP to only certified implementation partner companies. If you want to do any changes Provisioning then your Success Factor implementation partner only can do it.

Hope it helps.

Thanks,

AM

Thanks,

Meghanath

entry.title: Re: LOGON 770
entry.content:
Hello Azad,

Support for SAP GUI for Windows 7.70 ended in April. SAP GUI for Windows 8.00 is now the default release. 

You can download SAP GUI for Windows from the software downloads page 

https://me.sap.com/softwarecenter 

Search for SAP GUI FOR WINDOWS 8.00 CORE

entry.title: Re: CAPM-POST Request S/4 On-Premise System
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am also facing the issues in my CAP App to get CSRF-token from On-Premise System on my local environment (BAS). I followed the Official guideline from https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/remote-services?q=csrf#csrf-token-handling but I am not able to Fetch X-CSRF-Token and I couldn't send Post request to backend. I tried everything with HEAD, GET and POST request from OData Model and jQuery Ajax but no method is fetching X-CSRF-Token from backend. I can see request headers in the Browser with parameter X-Csrf-Token : Fetch but in response header there is nothing related to X-CSRF-Token.

Do you have any Idea how can I build a Workaround if standard solution is not working?

Regards

Khabir

Daniel

entry.title: Re: ABAP_trial 2022 HDB start problems: log full still ac...
entry.content:
Hi Wolfgang,

Perhaps I'm missing something, but default log segment count = 10240. Have you enlarged this, ie: 

  1. Stop the Hana DB.
  2. Increase the limit (e.g. <count> = 10240) :
    • hdblogdiag directory --enlarge <count> /hana/log/<sid>/mnt<id>/hdb<id>
    • The parameter <count> specifies the number of new entries which can be appended to the log segment directory.

  3. After extending the directory the database can be restarted and additional <count> log segments will be allocated.

Just let me know if I have missed something.

Best wishes,

JUlie.

entry.title: Excise and VAT solution for India in S4HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Does S4HANA Public cloud supports excise and VAT for India country ?

Currently, GST is the indirect tax which is applicable in India but there are certain products where excise and VAT is still applicable.

We would like to understand what are the scope items in S4HANA public cloud relevant for Excise and VAT in India ?

 

Thanks

Varun Arora

entry.title: Re: SAP Sales Service Cloud Version 2 API - Why no OData...
entry.content:
Hello,

The reason why v2 supports only REST and not OData is primarily due to design and architectural choices made by the developers. REST (Representational State Transfer) is a widely adopted architectural style for building APIs, and it offers simplicity and flexibility in terms of implementation and usage. Here are a few reasons why REST might have been chosen over OData for v2: Simplicity: REST APIs are generally simpler to implement and use compared to OData. REST focuses on standard HTTP methods and status codes, making it easier for developers to understand and work with. Flexibility: REST APIs provide more flexibility in terms of data formats and structures. While OData enforces specific conventions and formats, REST allows developers to design APIs that best fit their needs. Performance: REST APIs can be optimized for performance by minimizing the overhead associated with OData’s additional features and conventions.
Adoption: REST is more widely adopted and supported across various platforms and tools, making it easier to integrate with other systems and services. As for whether OData will be supported later, it depends on the feedback from users and the priorities of the development team. If there is significant demand for OData support, it might be considered in future updates.

Best Regard

Ford Benefits

entry.title: Re: Provisioning System Access by Customer
entry.content: In this case you have to reach out to your implementation partner, they only can help you.

entry.title: Reason for Manual Reconciliation in G/L Accounts? SAP B1
entry.content: We are about a year in to SAP B1 and curious if there is a need or what would be the reason to use the internal reconciliation within each of the G/L accounts in the Chart of Accounts?  For instance, in our Expense Accounts, everything is listed as 'unreconciled', including the year end closing posting.  Last year's Debits equal to the Year End closing Credit, so they = $0.00, just not sure if there is a need to 'reconcile' these items for any particular reason, or if they just stay unreconciled.  Any advice/help explaining would be greatly appreciated.  Thank you!

entry.title: What's New in Q2 2024 for the Release Navigator for SAP BTP
entry.content:
Check out the Release Navigator.

The Release Navigator for SAP BTP continues to evolve and improve to meet the needs of our customers. With the latest update in Q2 2024 in addition to the quarterly maintenance of resources, users can access new product pages and a new consolidated release schedule in a simplified and streamlined interface.
These updates reflect our commitment to continuously improve content coverage and user experience based on your valuable feedback. In this blog post, we will highlight the key enhancements and additions made in Q2 2024.

We collaborated closely with SAP BTP experts to add new pages for the following products and services in the Release Navigator that are available with the Q2 2024 update:

  • SAP Build Code
  • SAP Alert Notification
  • SAP Automation Pilot
  • SAP Cloud Identity Services
  • SAP Cloud Transport Management
  • SAP Content Agent

The new product pages include Foundation and Cross Services and more. Check them out now.

Check out the new consolidated release schedule in the release calendar.

Release schedules are now being communicated more transparently thanks to close collaboration with various SAP BTP teams. Compared to 2023, more than 40 new products and services now announce their release dates via SAP Notes in SAP for Me.

These notes are accessible through the Consolidated Release Schedules for SAP BTP, which can be found in the Release Calendar section of the navigator.

Please note: To access SAP Notes you need to log in to SAP for Me using your Universal ID or S-user ID. Read more about the required authorizations here.  

The SAP Note Consolidated Release Schedules for SAP BTP

We have published a quarterly maintenance update with the Q2 release cycle. Links and resources have been updated according to the latest feature releases. Moving forward, new and retiring content will be marked with a green or red badge. 

Additionally, in Q1 all release navigators received streamlined and consistent UX across solution areas for improved ease of use.

The release navigator after the Q2 update

 

 

*Disclaimer:  The schedule is subject to change without prior notice including, when necessary, delays or incorporating changes in subsequent update windows and not a commitment, promise, or legal obligation to deliver any material, code, or functionality.

Next updates are scheduled on a quarterly basis in alignment with the Harmonized Release Calendar for SAP Cloud Products.

Looking ahead, here's a sneak peek at some of the roadmap items planned for the release navigator:

  • Q3: Additional UX elements will be added and aligned across solution areas.
  • Q4: More products and services will be included in the Release Navigator.

The Readiness@Scale team at SAP Enterprise Support is dedicated to ensuring release readiness across the SAP Enterprise Support portfolio. Our mission is to empower SAP customers to be prepared and ready to adopt and utilize innovations.

If you have any feedback or specific requests for content in the release navigator, please don't hesitate to reach out to us.

And don't forget to check out our team's blogs tagged with Readiness@Scale.

Happy navigating!

Readiness@Scale, SAP Enterprise Support

entry.title: Re: Batch Query Duplicate records
entry.content:
Dear Mr. Chong,

Try Below Query:-

 

SELECT
T0."DocEntry" AS "GRN DocEntry",
T0."DocNum" AS "GRN Number",
T0."DocDate" AS "Document Date",
T0."DocCur" AS "Currency",
T1."LineNum" AS "Line Number",
T1."ItemCode" AS "Item Code",
T3."ItemName" AS "Item Name",
T1."Quantity" AS "Quantity Received",
T1."Price" AS "Price",
T2."BatchNum" AS "Batch Number",
LEFT(T4."PrdDate", 6) AS "Manufacturing Date",
T4."ExpDate" AS "Expiry Date",
T1."WhsCode" AS "Warehouse Code",
T4."Quantity" AS "Available Quantity"
FROM
OIGN T0
INNER JOIN IGN1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry"
LEFT JOIN IBT1 T2 ON T1."DocEntry" =T2."BaseEntry" and T1."LineNum" =T2."BaseLinNum" and T1."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode"
LEFT JOIN OITM T3 ON T1."ItemCode" = T3."ItemCode"
LEFT JOIN OIBT T4 ON T1."ItemCode" = T4."ItemCode" AND T2."BatchNum" = T4."BatchNum" AND T1."WhsCode" = T4."WhsCode" 
WHERE
T0."DocDate" >= '[%0]' AND T0."DocDate" <= '[%1]'

 

Regards,

Anand

entry.title: Re: Message getting stuck for AS2 receiver channel via Cert Auth from PI to CPI connection.
entry.content: Did you create a service key in BTP for the PI certificate you are using for authentication with the message sending role?
